query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mobileforge: annotation-free adaptation for mobile gui agents with hie" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of LLM-based GUI agents, which is the specific technical field of the user's "MobileForge" follow-up. Even though it is a survey rather than a specific method extension, it provides the essential background, terminology, and state-of-the-art landscape that a literature review for this topic must cite.
